purpose: Record why Studio reused, extended, hybridized, created, or deprecated a build recipe.

required_fields.requested_fingerprint: Structured recipe fingerprint requested by the brief.
required_fields.required_capabilities: Capability ids required by this recipe.
required_fields.qa_gates: QA gates bound to this recipe.

optional_fields.matched_recipe_id: Existing recipe id if reused or extended.
optional_fields.rejected_alternatives: Recipes or approaches not chosen and why.
optional_fields.v1_notes: Notes that belong in V1 execution.

proof_validation_expectations: intelligence_brief_id points to an existing brief.
decision is one of the allowed values.
required_capabilities and qa_gates are non-empty for executable work.
reason records why the selected path is better than alternatives.
V2 ideas are captured without expanding active scope.
